revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Amano‑Kaguyama Shrine
| native_name = 天香山神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Amano‑Kaguyama Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.572531|136.607334}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Amano‑Kaguyama Shrine'''|天香山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11378973|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province}}
** Series ordinal: 73
** P155: {{ill|Urufutsuno Shrine|lt=Urufutsuno Shrine|qid=Q135039289|1=Urufutsuno Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135039291|ltq=Q135039291|qid=Q135039291|1=Anashino Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Ise Province|lt=Ise Province|be|Ісэ (правінцыя)|ckb|پارێزگای ئیسێ|cs|Provincie Ise|de|Provinz Ise|en|Ise Province|es|Provincia de Ise|eu|Ise probintzia|fa|ولایت ایسه|fi|Isen provinssi|fr|Province d'Ise|gl|Provincia de Ise|hak|Yî-sṳ-koet|id|Provinsi Ise|it|Ise (provincia)|ja|伊勢国|ko|이세국|lt|Isės žemė|nl|Ise (provincie)|pt|Província de Ise|ru|Исэ (провинция)|simple|Ise Province|sk|Ise (provincia)|sr|Провинција Исе|tr|Ise (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ісе|zh_min_nan|Ise-kok|zh_yue|伊勢國|zh|伊勢國|qid=Q864166|1=Ise Province}}
